response.global_analysis: 1. Vocal Match: Checked Japanese lyrics against Kobo's cover song performance and verified exact timestamps. 2. Pacing & Timing: Structured translations to follow Kobo's vocal phrasing precisely, splitting pauses and maintaining smooth flow between clauses. 3. On-Screen Text: Included translations of on-screen titles during introductory silent segments to enhance viewer understanding.

subtitles.original: The night shines brighter when she sings...
subtitles.english: The night shines brighter when she sings...

subtitles.original: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink
subtitles.english: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink

subtitles.original: The moment we've all been waiting for...
subtitles.english: The moment we've all been waiting for...

subtitles.original: こんなことになるならなんて
subtitles.english: If things were going to turn out like this,

subtitles.original: 出会う前にわかってたら
subtitles.english: if only I had known before we met...

subtitles.original: もう少しだけしゃんとした僕を見せられたはずなんだ
subtitles.english: I should have been able to show you a slightly more decent side of myself.

subtitles.original: どうしたらいいのかなんて
subtitles.english: What should I do?

subtitles.original: 頭ではわかってるけど
subtitles.english: In my head, I know, but...

subtitles.original: なにげないちょっとした言葉でわあ
subtitles.english: A casual, small word of yours...

subtitles.original: 嬉しくなっちゃって
subtitles.english: makes me so happy,

subtitles.original: こんなバレバレじゃかっこ悪いな
subtitles.english: being this obvious is so uncool.

subtitles.original: けどこのままじゃ引き下がれないな
subtitles.english: But I can't back down like this.

subtitles.original: でも今も顔が照れくさくて
subtitles.english: Yet even now, my face is burning up...

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないです
subtitles.english: I can't say that I like you.

subtitles.original: この気持ち伝わるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if these feelings will reach you.

subtitles.original: 空回り空回り
subtitles.english: Spinning my wheels, spinning my wheels,

subtitles.original: 何度も言えずつまずいた
subtitles.english: fumbling to say it over and over.

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないです
subtitles.english: I like you so much, I can't help myself.

subtitles.original: 明日こそは言えるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can say it tomorrow.

subtitles.original: あなたも僕に同じように
subtitles.english: If you felt the exact same way...

subtitles.original: 恋してたらなんて考えちゃうんだ
subtitles.english: ...about me, I keep imagining.

subtitles.original: 会えない日が続いてる
subtitles.english: The days we can't meet keep going on.

subtitles.original: このままじゃよろしくない
subtitles.english: At this rate, it's not looking good.

subtitles.original: 会ったところで何ができるって
subtitles.english: It's not like I can do much...

subtitles.original: わけじゃないんだけど
subtitles.english: ...even if we actually met.

subtitles.original: こんな恋は二度とないな
subtitles.english: A love like this will never happen again.

subtitles.original: 頭ではわかってるけど
subtitles.english: In my head, I know, but...

subtitles.original: まぶしすぎるその笑顔がわあ
subtitles.english: That smile of yours is just too bright...

subtitles.original: 僕を焦らせるんだ
subtitles.english: ...and it makes me panic.

subtitles.original: ずっと見ていたくなるような
subtitles.english: I want to keep looking at you forever,

subtitles.original: 目そらしたくなってしまうような
subtitles.english: yet it makes me want to look away.

subtitles.original: こんな気持ちはわかるのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you understand this feeling.

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってくれるならそれでいいです
subtitles.english: As long as you smile, that's enough for me.

subtitles.original: でも隣は僕がいいな
subtitles.english: But I wish I were the one by your side.

subtitles.original: もしかしたら実はもう気付いてるんじゃないかな保存
subtitles.english: What if you've actually already noticed?

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないです
subtitles.english: I like you so much, I can't help myself.
